trivia_bullets.text: Pestilent Haze is an M21 original — first and only printing as of May 2026. It is an uncommon black Sorcery (2B) released July 3, 2020. [Scryfall]

Flavor text: "Your crops will rot. The air itself will turn against you. You will suffer as I have suffered." — Karaz, outcast. Karaz is not an established named lore character with broader MTG story context; the attribution to an "outcast" frames the speaker as someone weaponizing their own suffering, turning personal plague into communal curse. [Scryfall]

Pestilent Haze offers two modes: -2/-2 to all creatures until end of turn (a sweeper), or remove two loyalty counters from each planeswalker (a planeswalker suppressor). The split-mode design makes it a flexible sideboard or maindeck piece that answers both creature swarms and opposing walker ultimates. EDHREC rank 24,305 reflects low Commander adoption. [Scryfall]

Art by Sidharth Chaturvedi. The two-figure plague composition — one turning back over a shoulder in a wasteland — echoes the iconography of medieval plague imagery (shrouded travelers, visible mortality). Chaturvedi's color palette is near-monochromatic umber and charcoal, with a distinctive sickly green-yellow miasma as the only saturated color element. [Scryfall]
